title: cirsium horridum subsp. isophyllum
intro: Cirsium horridum subsp. isophyllum, also known as the thistle, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and Mediterranean regions. The medicinal properties of Cirsium horridum subsp. isophyllum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cirsium horridum subsp. isophyllum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
